query:
SELECT pri.id              as "id!: Uuid",
                      pri.pull_request_id as "pull_request_id!: String",
                      pri.issue_id        as "issue_id!: Uuid"
               FROM pull_request_issues pri
               INNER JOIN issues i ON i.id = pri.issue_id
               WHERE i.project_id = $1
               ORDER BY pri.id ASC
